product_results.title: FitVille Extra Wide Mens Golf Shoes Professional Outdoor Waterproof Spiked Golf Shoes for Men

summary.text: These shoes offer a very good wide fit and conform to the description for wide feet. Customers find them really comfortable and large comfortable. The shoes are considered a good product with good looks, though some mention they look cheap. Customers appreciate the water resistance and find them lightweight. However, opinions are mixed regarding durability and traction.

authors_reviews.title: Great!
authors_reviews.text: These golf shoes are great. Nice and wide and very comfortable. Great on the feet. Surpassed my expectations. Also very good looking. One of the few golf shoes that several people commented on how good they look. Very satisfied.
authors_reviews.author: linda

authors_reviews.title: Nice wide width
authors_reviews.text: My husband loves them, nice and wide and feel comfortable. He says the golf stores seldom have wide widths and never extra wide. He has not golfed in them yet.
authors_reviews.author: Dawn G.

authors_reviews.title: They fit wide feet and are comfortable
authors_reviews.text: These shoes fit my wide foot very well and after 10 rounds I am still very happy with them. They are probably the most comfortable golf shoes I have owned. They did crease on the first day I wore them and hopefully this won’t create tears. They also survived a couple of wet mornings and no leaks.
authors_reviews.author: Don B.

authors_reviews.title: All sizes available. Choose a half too full size larger.
authors_reviews.text: Finally I found a place where I can order a 13xw golf shoe. I haven’t worn them on the course yet but they fit perfect. They are also a good looking shoe and waterproof as advertised. Very reasonably priced. If they pass the test on the golf course I will be buying another pair.
authors_reviews.author: Ron W

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable
authors_reviews.text: Super comfortable, get lots of compliments on the looks. Being a wide fit, my inserts fit great.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great shoe x fits EEE
authors_reviews.text: X-wide fits my EEE foot and very light and comfortable. Well built and stylish. Cleats are molded into tread so won't be same as an expensive shoe with replaceable cleats but that's fine. I never had to replace a cleat ever. Great to have shoes that fit so well! Very happy.
authors_reviews.author: Mark E

authors_reviews.title: shorter than picklball version.
authors_reviews.text: Golf version is slightly shorter than my Fitville Court/pickelball shoe.Love these shoes, very comfortable and sturdy.
authors_reviews.author: Stephane Landry

authors_reviews.title: Good quality
authors_reviews.text: Good fitting comfortable shoe. Don't mind a bad round wearing these!!
authors_reviews.author: Hogan
